scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && npm --workspace @albumsl/web run dev
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:functions && npm run build:web
scripts.build:packages: npm --workspace @albumsl/domain run build && npm --workspace @albumsl/contracts run build && npm --workspace @albumsl/application run build && npm --workspace @albumsl/infra-firebase run build
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:rules
scripts.test:unit: npm run build:packages && vitest run --passWithNoTests packages functions apps
scripts.test:rules: firebase emulators:exec --project albumsl-test --only firestore "vitest run tests/firestore/firestore.rules.test.ts"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:packages && npm --workspace @albumsl/functions run typecheck && npm --workspace @albumsl/web run typecheck
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run format:check
